activities_projects.title: Story Reading Activity
activities_projects.objective: Improve reading and understanding of the story
steps: Read the story 'Wisdom Paves the Way' aloud in class
Take turns reading paragraphs
Underline difficult words
Discuss the meaning of the new words with your teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve reading fluency and vocabulary
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation in reading and correct pronunciation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Builder
activities_projects.objective: Learn meanings of new words from the story
steps: Identify unfamiliar words in the story
Use a dictionary to find their meanings
Write the words and meanings in your notebook
Create sentences using those words
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and sentence formation

activities_projects.title: Understanding the Characters
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters and their roles in the story
steps: List the main characters from the story
Write one or two qualities for each character
Discuss how wisdom helped the characters solve problems
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand character traits and moral lessons
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of characters and traits (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Story Sequence Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sequence of events in the story
steps: Read the story carefully
Write the important events in the correct order
Discuss the sequence with your classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how events are organised in a story

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Identify the message or moral of the story
steps: Discuss the main message of the story
Explain how wisdom helped solve the problem
Write the moral of the story in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the lesson conveyed by the story
activities_projects.evaluation: Clear explanation of the moral (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Question and Answer Practice
steps: Answer the comprehension questions given in the textbook
Write complete sentences
Check your answers with the teacher
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of answers (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play Activity
steps: Form small groups
Choose characters from the story
Act out a short scene from the story
Present it to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve communication and teamwork skills

activities_projects.title: Draw the Story Scene
activities_projects.objective: Encourage creativity and understanding of the story
steps: Choose your favourite scene from the story
Draw the scene on paper
Write a short description of the scene
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students express their understanding through art

activities_projects.title: Sentence Writing Activity
steps: Choose five words from the story
Write meaningful sentences using those words
Read the sentences aloud in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve grammar and sentence formation

activities_projects.title: Personal Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Connect the story with real-life situations
steps: Think about a situation where wisdom helped solve a problem
Write a short paragraph describing that situation
Share your paragraph with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students reflect on the importance of wisdom in daily life
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and relevance of reflection (10 marks)
